dimension_description: Loss of meaning, interest, and motivation regarding school and schoolwork
text: In business class, we build a 'company' for a simulation. It's all fake money and fake decisions. How is this different from playing a board game? I question its educational value.
text_review: In business class, we build a 'company' for a simulation. It's all fake money and fake decisions. How is this different from playing a board game? I question its educational value.

dimension: Cynicism toward the meaning of school
dimension_description: Loss of meaning, interest, and motivation regarding school and schoolwork
text: I'm learning about medieval plagues for a standardized test. The connections to modern pandemics are obvious but ignored by the curriculum. The meaning is there, but we're not allowed to see it.
text_review: I'm learning about medieval plagues for a standardized test. The connections to modern pandemics are obvious but ignored by the curriculum. The meaning is there, but we're not allowed to see it.

dimension_description: Feelings of emotional and physical depletion caused by school demands
text: I was supposed to go to my sister’s soccer game. I stayed in to study. She scored the winning goal, and I wasn’t there to see it. She’s proud, but I know she’s hurt. That moment is gone forever, and I chose a textbook instead.
text_review: I was supposed to go to my sister’s soccer game. I stayed in to study. She scored the winning goal, and I wasn’t there to see it. She’s proud, but I know she’s hurt. That moment is gone forever, and I chose a textbook instead.

dimension: Cynicism toward the meaning of school
dimension_description: Loss of meaning, interest, and motivation regarding school and schoolwork
text: My teacher said we could choose our own topic for the final project. Great freedom! My first thought was, 'Ugh, another thing to decide on.' The opportunity to explore something I might care about fills me with apathy, not excitement.
text_review: My teacher said we could choose our own topic for the final project. Great freedom! My first thought was, 'Ugh, another thing to decide on.' The opportunity to explore something I might care about fills me with apathy, not excitement.

dimension_description: Feelings of emotional and physical depletion caused by school demands
text: The weekend is not for recovery. It's for catching up on the work I couldn't do during the week because I was too exhausted from lack of sleep. It's a hamster wheel with no off switch.
text_review: The weekend is not for recovery. It's for catching up on the work I couldn't do during the week because I was too exhausted from lack of sleep. It's a hamster wheel with no off switch.

dimension_description: Diminished confidence in one's academic abilities and lowered self-expectations
text: I look at the grading rubric and know I won't hit the top levels. My analysis will be 'limited,' my synthesis 'basic.' I'm not aiming for excellence anymore; I'm aiming for 'not failing.' That's my ceiling.
text_review: I look at the grading rubric and know I won't hit the top levels. My analysis will be 'limited,' my synthesis 'basic.' I'm not aiming for excellence anymore; I'm aiming for 'not failing.' That's my ceiling.
